steps.title: Isolate the $p$ term
steps.content: Start with $$\frac{6}{7}p+18=54.$$ Subtract $18$ from both sides: $$\frac{6}{7}p=36.$$

steps.title: Evaluate the requested expression
steps.content: The question asks for $7p$, so $$7p=7(42)=294.$$ The answer is 294. Be careful not to stop at $p=42$; the requested expression is seven times that value.
